title: Turtle's Traversal
description: A simple vanillia+ modpack made for adventure and performance.
body:
Turtle's Traversal modpack is a fabric 1.20.1 modpack that aims to be relatively vanillia+ with around 90 mods built for large biome generation and structure mods but with many performance mods to make it playable and some nice QOL and ambient changes. 

The main biome generation mod is Terralith due to its very large and amazing looking biomes.

The structure mods including things such as YUNG's mods, Repurposed Structures, and Towns & Towers to spice up the world.

The performance mods include the basics like sodium and lithium but many others that improve small parts of the game to bring up FPS by a good bit.

The QOL and ambient mods include things such as the Inmis backpack mod (with the 3d addon), better ladders, wakes, 3D skin layers, and the ambient sounds and environments mods, Fresh Animations, Xaero's world and mini map, continuity, visuality, vanillia refresh, trinkets, rethinking voxels (which i think may be the best shader pack), and many more!

This modpack was inspired by Flowstate's videos on how to make minecraft feel like a sequal and his Better Adventures+ modpack

I used the AT launcher and its great built in modrinth support to build this pack btw

(I intend to mainly just use this with some friends on a server so it may get updated some but probably not a lot)
